testcase.name: Chat transition: diagnostic -> final_report > transitions directly to final_report on transition signal and never writes labor_confirmation
testcase.system-out:
[Chat API v2] Input: detected=EN (heuristic-default), dialogue=EN, Output: mode=AUTO, effective=EN, strategy=auto, includeTranslation=false, translationLanguage=none
[Chat API v2] Procedure catalog: water_pump [Chat API v2] Context Engine: intent=MAIN_DIAGNOSTIC, submode=main, stateChanged=false
[Chat API v2] Context Engine: recorded action type=question [Chat API v2] Auto-transition to final_report (transition-signal)

testcase.name: Chat transition: diagnostic -> final_report > transitions directly to final_report when pivot is triggered by context engine
testcase.system-out:
[Chat API v2] Input: detected=EN (heuristic-default), dialogue=EN, Output: mode=AUTO, effective=EN, strategy=auto, includeTranslation=false, translationLanguage=none
[Chat API v2] Procedure catalog: water_pump [Chat API v2] Context Engine: intent=MAIN_DIAGNOSTIC, submode=main, stateChanged=true [Chat API v2] Pivot triggered (Context Engine): "Pump non-responsive under direct 12V"
[Chat API v2] Validation failed, retrying with correction...
[Chat API v2] Retry failed, using safe fallback in EN [Chat API v2] Context Engine: recorded action type=question [Chat API v2] Auto-transition to final_report (context-engine-pivot)
testcase.system-err:
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_123, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m ]
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_123, mode=diagnostic): [ [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_DRIFT: Output looks like a final report while in diagnostic mode'[39m, [32m'DIAGNOSTIC_QUESTION: Output does not contain a question'[39m ]
[Chat API v2] Final report generation error after transition: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'ok')

testcase.name: Chat final_report labor override > keeps mode in final_report and regenerates report with canonical labor total
testcase.system-out:
[Chat API v2] Input: detected=EN (heuristic-default), dialogue=EN, Output: mode=AUTO, effective=EN, strategy=auto, includeTranslation=false, translationLanguage=none
[Chat API v2] Final report labor override requested: total=1.0 hr
testcase.system-err:
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_789, mode=final_report): [ [32m'PROHIBITED_WORDS: English section contains denial-trigger words: failed'[39m ]
[Chat API v2] Labor override response invalid after retry, using fallback for 1.0 hr

testcase.name: Chat final_report labor override > parses Russian override request and normalizes total to one decimal
testcase.system-out:
[Chat API v2] Input: detected=RU (heuristic-cyrillic), dialogue=RU, Output: mode=AUTO, effective=RU, strategy=auto, includeTranslation=true, translationLanguage=RU
[Chat API v2] Final report labor override requested: total=1.0 hr
testcase.system-err:
[ModeValidator] Violations (case=case_789, mode=final_report): [ [32m"FINAL_REPORT_FORMAT: Missing '--- TRANSLATION ---' separator"[39m, [32m'FINAL_REPORT_LANG_POLICY: English section contains non-English characters'[39m ]
[Chat API v2] Labor override response invalid after retry, using fallback for 1.0 hr

testcase.name: Chat final_report labor override > does not trigger labor override when intent keywords are absent
testcase.system-out:
[Chat API v2] Input: detected=EN (heuristic-default), dialogue=EN, Output: mode=AUTO, effective=EN, strategy=auto, includeTranslation=false, translationLanguage=none
[Chat API v2] Validation failed, retrying with correction...
[Chat API v2] Retry failed, using safe fallback in EN
